case_title: CHARLES W. MODLIN ET AL VS. ZIMMELMAN JEWELRY COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MODLIN, CHARLES W. LEBLANC, VICKI A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZIMMELMAN JEWELRY COMPANY, INC. (A/K/A LANG, LANG JEWELRY AND ANTIQUES, LANG ANTIQUE & ESTATE JEWELERS, AND LANG ANTIQUE & ESTATE JEWELRY) $9,221.18 PRINCIPAL, $5,053.23 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,644.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $5,053.23 INTEREST, $1,199.73 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODLIN, CHARLES W. LEBLANC, VICKI A.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODLIN, CHARLES W. LEBLANC, VICKI A. AS TO DEFENDANT ZIMMELMAN JEWELRY COMPANY, INC. (A/K/A LANG, LANG JEWELRY AND ANTIQUES, LANG ANTIQUE & ESTATE JEWELERS, AND LANG ANTIQUE & ESTATE JEWELRY) JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT, JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1710.25, NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEBLANC, VICKI A.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2,924.89 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MODLIN, CHARLES W. LEBLANC, VICKI A.

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZIMMELMAN JEWELRY COMPANY, INC. (A/K/A LANG, LANG JEWELRY AND ANTIQUES, LANG ANTIQUE & ESTATE JEWELERS, AND LANG ANTIQUE & ESTATE JEWELRY)
